title: Jasper Counts Happy Things
synopsis: Join Jasper as he counts from one to five while discovering happy things around him, learning numbers and exploring joyful feelings.

pages.text: This is Jasper! He loves to count happy things.

illustration.description: A cheerful boy with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes standing in a bright room with colorful toys scattered around, smiling widely with arms outstretched
illustration.alt: Happy Jasper with toys around him

pages.text: One big smile! Jasper feels happy.

illustration.description: Close-up of Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes showing one enormous bright smile, with a large colorful number 1 prominently displayed beside his face
illustration.alt: Jasper with one big smile and number 1

pages.text: Two warm hugs! Mama and Dada hug Jasper.

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes receiving hugs from two adults, with two distinct hug gestures clearly visible and a large number 2 decorated with hearts
illustration.alt: Jasper getting two hugs with number 2

pages.text: Three bouncy balls! Red, blue, yellow. Jasper giggles.

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes playing with three distinct colorful balls (red, blue, yellow) arranged in a clear triangle pattern with a bold number 3
illustration.alt: Jasper with three colorful balls and number 3

pages.text: Four silly faces! Jasper makes funny faces in the mirror.

illustration.description: Four mirrors showing Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes making four different silly expressions, each mirror clearly numbered, with a large decorative number 4
illustration.alt: Four mirrors with Jasper's silly faces and number 4

pages.text: Five clapping hands! Clap, clap, clap! Jasper feels so happy counting.

illustration.description: Jasper with wavy reddish-brown hair, fair freckled skin, green eyes with five hand prints around him showing clapping motion, each hand clearly visible and countable, with a rainbow number 5
illustration.alt: Jasper surrounded by five clapping hands and number 5

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many balls does Jasper play with?
questions.explanation: Jasper plays with three bouncy balls - red, blue, and yellow!

questions.question: What makes Jasper feel happy?
questions.explanation: Jasper feels happy when he counts fun things like smiles, hugs, and toys!

questions.question: How many hugs does Jasper get?
questions.explanation: Jasper gets two warm hugs from Mama and Dada!
